summary.zh-CN: 新增千问平台支持，修复 DeepSeek 和 Gemini 适配问题，数据加载更稳定可靠。
summary.en: Added Qwen platform support, fixed DeepSeek and Gemini adapter issues, improved data loading reliability.

description.zh-CN: 支持千问（Qwen）AI 对话平台的自动保存，使用稳定的语义化选择器确保长期兼容
description.en: Support automatic saving for Qwen AI chat platform, using stable semantic selectors for long-term compatibility

description.zh-CN: 修复 DeepSeek 页面结构更新导致的对话无法自动保存问题
description.en: Fixed conversation auto-save failure caused by DeepSeek page structure update

description.zh-CN: 修复 Gemini 中文环境下用户消息被多提取「你说」前缀的问题
description.en: Fixed user messages in Gemini Chinese environment being prefixed with extra accessibility text

description.zh-CN: 单条异常数据不再导致全部对话加载失败，异常对话会显示提示而非空白
description.en: A single corrupted record no longer causes all conversations to fail loading; corrupted conversations show a warning instead of blank

summary.zh-CN: 圣诞惊喜！新增 Kimi 平台支持，悬浮标签全新视觉升级，浏览器兼容性大幅提升，还有智能引导功能带你轻松上手～
summary.en: Christmas surprise! Added Kimi platform support, floating tag visual upgrade, major browser compatibility improvements, plus smart guidance to help you get started!

title.zh-CN: 新增 Kimi 平台支持

description.zh-CN: 现在可以自动保存 Kimi 的对话记录了，AI 对话平台支持更全面
description.en: Now you can automatically save Kimi conversation records, with more comprehensive AI platform support

description.zh-CN: 重新设计悬浮标签视觉效果，更加精致美观，交互体验更流畅自然
description.en: Redesigned floating tag visuals for a more refined look and smoother interaction experience

description.zh-CN: 现在 Dia、夸克等任何浏览器中，都能正常打开本扩展的界面了
description.en: Now the extension interface works properly in any browser including Dia, Quark, and more

description.zh-CN: 在 Chrome、Edge 浏览器内部页面点击扩展时，显示品牌化引导弹窗，告诉你如何正确使用
description.en: When clicking the extension on browser internal pages, a branded guide popup appears to help you get started

summary.zh-CN: 新增 Kimi 平台支持，修复豆包平台问题，大幅提升浏览器兼容性，让你在任何浏览器中都能流畅使用！
summary.en: Added Kimi platform support, fixed Doubao platform issues, and greatly improved browser compatibility for seamless use in any browser!

title.zh-CN: 新 AI 对话平台支持

description.zh-CN: 新增支持 Kimi 平台，现在可以自动保存 Kimi 的对话记录了
description.en: Added support for Kimi platform, now you can automatically save Kimi conversation records

description.zh-CN: 修复了豆包平台消息保存失败的问题，确保所有对话都能可靠保存
description.en: Fixed message saving failure issue on Doubao platform, ensuring all conversations are reliably saved

description.zh-CN: 兼容性大优化：现在 Dia、夸克等任何浏览器中，都能正常打开本扩展的界面了
description.en: Major compatibility optimization: Now the extension interface works properly in any browser including Dia, Quark, and more

summary.zh-CN: 新增豆包、Claude平台支持，长消息收折显示优化阅读体验，同时修复导出和对话时间相关问题
summary.en: Added support for Doubao and Claude platforms, optimized reading experience with long message collapsing, and fixed export and conversation timing issues

title.zh-CN: 我们支持新的 AI 平台啦

description.zh-CN: 现在在豆包、Claude两个主流 AI 平台，也能自动保存对话记录了
description.en: Now you can automatically save conversation records in Doubao and Claude, two mainstream AI platforms

title.zh-CN: 长消息收折显示，优化阅读体验
title.en: Long Message Collapsing, Optimized Reading Experience

description.zh-CN: 在详情页中，过长的对话将会收折显示，优化阅读体验和页面性能
description.en: Long conversations in detail pages will be collapsed for better reading experience and page performance

description.zh-CN: 优化导出相关的样式与国际化问题，提升用户体验
description.en: Optimized export-related styling and internationalization issues for better user experience

description.zh-CN: 修复重进已保存对话的源网页会导致最近对话时间变更的问题
description.en: Fixed issue where re-entering saved conversation source pages would change recent conversation timestamps

summary.zh-CN: 新增筛选与多选导出功能，优化悬浮标签体验，并解决了多个重要问题，提升插件稳定性和国际化支持！
summary.en: Added filtering and multi-select export features, optimized floating tag experience, and resolved several important issues to improve plugin stability and internationalization support!

description.zh-CN: 现在可以按平台、时间范围筛选对话；并且按需多选对话导出
description.en: Now you can filter conversations by platform and time range; and multi-select conversations for export as needed

description.zh-CN: 当拖拽悬浮标签接近屏幕边缘时，会显示视觉引导提示，松手后标签会贴边半隐藏
description.en: When dragging the floating tag near screen edges, visual guidance prompts appear, and the tag will semi-hide at the edge after release

description.zh-CN: 解决图标在国际网络环境较差时无法显示的问题，提升插件稳定性
description.en: Fixed icon display issues in poor international network environments, improving plugin stability

description.zh-CN: 扩展导出文件的字符支持，新增日文平假名、片假名、韩文字符支持，修复日文用户导出 zip 文件时的文件名乱码问题
description.en: Extended character support for exported files, added support for Japanese Hiragana, Katakana, and Korean characters, fixed filename encoding issues when Japanese users export zip files

description.zh-CN: 避免手动保存模式下，刷新页面会触发自动保存
description.en: Prevent automatic saving from being triggered when refreshing the page in manual save mode

summary.zh-CN: 优化了记录管理体验，现在可以直接在列表中修改标题，同时增强了数据持久化能力，让你的聊天记录更安全！
summary.en: Optimized record management experience. You can now edit titles directly in the list, and enhanced data persistence to keep your chat records safer!

description.zh-CN: 现在可以在记录列表上直接修改标题了
description.en: You can now edit titles directly in the record list

description.zh-CN: 优化了记录卡片和详情页的交互
description.en: Optimized interactions for record cards and detail pages

description.zh-CN: 数据持久化增强: 防止数据被浏览器自动清理
description.en: Enhanced data persistence: prevents data from being automatically cleared by the browser

summary.zh-CN: 感谢用户 @James 的建议，你要的合并导出聊天记录为单一文件的功能来了，方便大家与 AI 平台对话交互 🥰
summary.en: Thanks to user @James' suggestion, the feature to merge and export chat records into a single file is here, making it convenient for everyone to interact with AI platforms 🥰

description.zh-CN: 新增「合并为一个文档」导出的功能，方便与 AI 平台对话
description.en: Added 'merge into one document' export feature for convenient AI platform conversations

summary.zh-CN: 文案优化和 Gemini 平台功能增强，再也不怕多用户状态下，Gemini 的对话记录无法保存了！感谢用户 @William、LUCIFER 的反馈 🙌
summary.en: Copy optimization and Gemini platform enhancements. No more worries about Gemini conversation records not being saved in multi-user scenarios! Thanks to users @William and LUCIFER for their feedback 🙌

description.zh-CN: 修正悬浮标签「自动记忆中」文案为「自动记忆」，防止误解
description.en: Fixed floating label text from 'Auto Memorizing' to 'Auto Memory' to prevent misunderstanding

description.zh-CN: 新增对 `/*/*/app/*` 和 `/*/*/gem/*/*` URL 格式的支持
description.en: Added support for `/*/*/app/*` and `/*/*/gem/*/*` URL formats

summary.zh-CN: 增加首次安装引导功能，方便你们快速上手～
summary.en: Added first-time installation guide feature to help you get started quickly~

description.zh-CN: 增加了首次下载安装时，弹出引导网页的功能
description.en: Added feature to show guide webpage when first downloading and installing

summary.zh-CN: Chat Memo 的第一个对外公开版本，祝大家使用愉快！
summary.en: Chat Memo's first public release version, hope everyone enjoys using it!

description.zh-CN: 新增了强大的关键词搜索功能，可以快速在所有对话记录中查找内容
description.en: Added powerful keyword search functionality to quickly find content across all conversation records

description.zh-CN: 修复了 Gemini 平台的问题，确保刷新页面后不会丢失消息记录
description.en: Fixed Gemini platform issues, ensuring message records won't be lost after page refresh

description.zh-CN: 产品名称正式更新为 "Chat Memo"，以更好地反映其核心价值
description.en: Product name officially updated to "Chat Memo" to better reflect its core value

description.zh-CN: 增加了官方网站入口
description.en: Added official website entry

description.zh-CN: 优化了界面 UI 细节
description.en: Optimized UI details
